Name: ADefaultPawn
Description:
DefaultPawn implements a simple Pawn with spherical collision and built-in flying movement.
  @see UFloatingPawnMovement

Variables.Name: BaseTurnRate
Variables.Description: Base turn rate, in degsec. Other scaling may affect final turn rate.

Variables.Name: BaseLookUpRate
Variables.Description: Base lookup rate, in degsec. Other scaling may affect final lookup rate.

Variables.Name: MeshComponent
Variables.Description: The mesh associated with this Pawn.

Variables.Name: bAddDefaultMovementBindings
Variables.Description: If true, adds default input bindings for movement and camera look.

Functions.Name: MoveForward
Functions.Description: Input callback to move forward in local space (or backward if Val is negative).

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount of movement in the forward direction (or backward if negative).

Functions.Name: MoveRight
Functions.Description: Input callback to strafe right in local space (or left if Val is negative).

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount of movement in the right direction (or left if negative).

Functions.Name: MoveUp_World
Functions.Description: Input callback to move up in world space (or down if Val is negative).

Params.Name: Val
Params.Description: Amount of movement in the world up direction (or down if negative).

Functions.Name: TurnAtRate
Functions.Description: Called via input to turn at a given rate.

Params.Name: Rate
Params.Description: This is a normalized rate, i.e. 1.0 means 100% of desired turn rate

Functions.Name: LookUpAtRate
Functions.Description: Called via input to look up at a given rate (or down if Rate is negative).

Params.Name: Rate
Params.Description: This is a normalized rate, i.e. 1.0 means 100% of desired turn rate
